hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); case "$f" in *.json) out=$(python3 -m json.tool "$f" 2>&1 >/dev/null) || { printf 'JSON 校验失败：%s\n%s\n' "$f" "$out" >&2; exit 2; };; esac
f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); case "$f" in *.sh) out=$(shellcheck "$f" 2>&1) || { printf 'shellcheck 告警：%s\n%s\n' "$f" "$out" >&2; exit 2; };; esac
